steps.expected: Reset form renders with new password, confirm password, and submit button
steps.observed: Rendered 'Set new password' page with both password fields and a Reset Password button; no blank/404 state

evidence.network: No submission attempted for this render check.

steps.action: Enter Password123! and Password123? then submit
steps.expected: Inline 'Passwords do not match' error and no reset request
steps.observed: Inline 'Passwords do not match' error rendered; agent-browser network log remained empty after submit

evidence.network: agent-browser network requests after clearing log: []

steps.action: Enter short1 in both password fields and submit
steps.expected: Inline minimum-length validation error and no reset request
steps.observed: Inline 'Password must be at least 8 characters' error rendered; agent-browser network log remained empty after submit

evidence.network: agent-browser network requests after clearing log: []

assertions.title: Reset-password submits token and new password to API

steps.action: Enter matching Password123! values on /reset-password?token=trace-token and submit
steps.expected: POST reset request sends token + new password and submit button shows loading
steps.observed: Button changed to 'Resetting...' and browser trace captured POST /api/auth/reset-password with body containing masked newPassword plus token=trace-token

assertions.title: Successful password reset shows success state

steps.action: Create a dedicated account and request a real password reset link
steps.expected: Obtain a valid reset token so the successful reset state can be exercised
steps.observed: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset returned 400 RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED, so no valid token could be obtained

assertions.issues: Blocked because the real forgot-password endpoint is disabled in this environment, so a valid reset token was unattainable and the success path could not be exercised.

steps.expected: Friendly invalid/expired token error with link to /forgot-password
steps.observed: UI showed 'Invalid token' plus 'Request a new link' pointing to /forgot-password; no crash/raw object rendered

steps.action: Navigate to /reset-password with no token query
steps.expected: Helpful fallback state or redirect to forgot-password
steps.observed: Rendered 'Invalid reset link' fallback with explanatory copy plus a 'Request new link' CTA to /forgot-password

evidence.network: No submission attempted for this fallback-state check.

assertions.title: Forgot-password uses dynamic origin for redirect URL

steps.action: Submit forgot-password with the registered test email from http://localhost:3000/forgot-password
steps.expected: Request body uses current origin + /reset-password for redirectTo
steps.observed: Browser trace captured request body with redirectTo set to http://localhost:3000/reset-password

assertions.title: Password reset flow

steps.observed: Forgot-password page opened correctly from sign-in

steps.expected: Success state 'Check your email' with back-to-sign-in link
steps.observed: Form stayed on /forgot-password and showed inline error 'Reset password isn't enabled'

steps.expected: Same success copy as registered email with no account-existence leak
steps.observed: Received the same 400 RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED error body and the same inline error UI, so no info leak was observed but the required success state/copy never appeared

steps.action: Use the visible sign-in link on the page
steps.observed: Bottom 'Sign in' link returned to /sign-in, but the success state's 'Back to sign in' step was unavailable because success never rendered

evidence.network: feature-fixes/auth-reset/forgot-password-registered-trace.zip and forgot-password-unregistered-trace.zip both show POST /api/auth/request-password-reset -> 400 {"message":"Reset password isn't enabled","code":"RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED"}

assertions.issues: Fail: the flow never reaches the required 'Check your email' success state for either registered or unregistered addresses because the backend returns RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED.

frictions.description: agent-browser's request list captured URLs/methods but not POST bodies, so I used agent-browser trace archives plus local python extraction to read request/response payloads for reset-password and forgot-password requests.
frictions.resolution: Saved trace ZIPs in the evidence directory and extracted the referenced request/response JSON blobs to confirm token/newPassword and redirectTo payloads.

blockers.description: The real forgot-password endpoint is disabled in this environment: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset returned 400 RESET_PASSWORD_DISABLED for both registered and unregistered emails, preventing retrieval of a valid reset token.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried the flow with both a freshly created registered account and an unregistered email after reloading /forgot-password; both received the same 400 response.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-004: forgot-password never reaches the required success state), and 1 was blocked (VAL-AUTH-005: no valid reset token could be obtained because request-password-reset is disabled).
